data.content: Implementation review approved. The max-iterations test (line 273) was rewritten in commit 5a7347f8 to properly exercise terminal-manager.ts:1224-1231. It drives 10 take-loop iterations by chaining child close(0) events through buildNextTakePrompt, then verifies the guard takeIteration >= MAX_TAKE_ITERATIONS fires, calling enforceQueueTerminalInvariant().finally(() => finishSession(1)). All 5 tests pass, 0 lint errors, typecheck clean. Only 1 file changed (test file). Prior rejection resolved.
